seoTitle: Eastern Heights vs Eatons Hill — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Eastern Heights and Eatons Hill. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Eastern Heights vs Eatons Hill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Eastern Heights and Eatons Hill.
heading: Eastern Heights vs Eatons Hill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Eastern Heights, Queensland and Eatons Hill, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Eatons Hill has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Eastern Heights (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Eastern Heights or Eatons Hill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Eastern Heights has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Eatons Hill scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Eastern Heights scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Eatons Hill scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Eastern Heights or Eatons Hill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Eatons Hill has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.22% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
